reviewer.name: JiYong / Tars
reviewer.role: CornerStone owner and target decision owner

reviewed_cases.finding: The bottom line and first conflicts/risks statement drop the source qualifier 'not recorded' and assert categorical absence of an owner or recommendation.

reviewed_cases.citation_warning: The availability-above-trigger statement is semantically supported by the complete case, but its citation_refs omit the contract clause containing the 98.5% trigger.

non_blocking_recommendation_findings: BrightDesk calls the unsigned DPA a compliance blocker although the source only says it remains unsigned.
policy-change-06 should recommend naming an escalation contact rather than assigning a separate owner to fill the field.
decision_reason: Two load-bearing Acme statements materially overstate record absence, and ParcelFlow needs the threshold-source citation added before the package is fully citation-grounded.
